case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. CHRISTOPHER BACILIO GARCIA

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$65.00) SERVED FEB-20-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA, CHRISTOPHER BACILIO
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,487.00 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA, CHRISTOPHER BACILIO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-03-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE BY REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY MARIA BLANC, LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF REQUESTED THIS MATTER BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS SETTLED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 2/16/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
